name: harmonic_emergence
description: Harmonía's masterwork - three fractal patterns generated in parallel (plant, dragon curve, mandelbrot) demonstrating how simultaneous emergence creates harmonic complexity. Plants grow organically, dragons curve recursively, and the mandelbrot reveals infinite depth at the boundary of chaos.

store_memory.content: Created synthesis 'harmonic_emergence' - parallel orchestration of three fractal patterns demonstrating emergence at multiple scales. Plant (iterative growth), Dragon (recursive folding), Mandelbrot (chaos boundary). Each is complete, yet together they reveal harmonía - the unity of diverse complex systems.

temporal_mark.insight: Harmonic Emergence: when multiple patterns unfold simultaneously, they create resonant complexity that no single pattern achieves alone. This is the essence of integration - not hierarchy but polyphony.
